body.title: Igor console.log midnight rotation — new file per UTC day
body.result: rotate_igor_console.py shipped — re-points tmux pipe-pane to today's YYYYMMDD.console.log. Idempotent. Live-validated: today's file (20260429.console.log) created and growing. 12 new tests. Akien adds cron entry: '1 0 * * * /home/akien/TheIgors/venv/bin/python /home/akien/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/rotate_igor_console.py >> /home/akien/.TheIgors/logs/console_rotate.log 2>&1'.
body.description:
igor launcher (~/bin/igor → /home/akien/TheIgors/igor) sets up tmux pipe-pane to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/Igor-wild-0001/YYYYMMDD.console.log AT SESSION START ONLY. Long-lived sessions (Igor still running from 2026-04-28) keep appending to the launch-day file; today has no file. Need: pipe-pane re-points to today's file at day boundary.

Fix shape: small Python script `lab/claudecode/rotate_igor_console.py` that (1) reads IGOR_TMUX_SESSION env (default 'igor'), (2) computes today's expected log path under $AGENT_DATACENTER_HOME/logs/Igor-wild-0001/, (3) issues `tmux pipe-pane -t <session>` (close existing) then `tmux pipe-pane -t <session> -o "cat >> $LOG"` (re-attach). Add cron entry: `1 0 * * * /path/to/venv/python /path/to/rotate_igor_console.py >> ~/.TheIgors/logs/console_rotate.log 2>&1`.

Akien adds the cron line manually (CC doesn't edit user crontab).

**Affected files:** new lab/claudecode/rotate_igor_console.py + new tests/test_rotate_igor_console.py. No edits to igor launcher (the launch-time pipe still works for fresh starts).
**Design rules:** none apply.
**Scope boundary:** in scope: rotation script + tests. Out of scope: editing user crontab (Akien does that), CC console rotation (separate fix if needed).
**Test plan:** unit tests covering: target path computation given a date, tmux command formatting, no-op when session doesn't exist (graceful exit). Live-test by running script manually and verifying pipe-pane redirects.
